subject: Pipeline restart status + search-and-enrich rework brief
body:
Booker — full status handoff from today's pipeline restart session.

## What Happened Today (2026-04-16)

1. Toby green-lit full pipeline restart after 2-week pause.
2. Harvey: 45-site canonical schema migration DONE (zero errors). Scraped tangomango (803 events), nytango (538 events), tangoutopia (135 events). Handoffs prepped for you and Porter.
3. CDP port fix: PR #7 merged to main (9222→9223, env-configurable via BOOKER_CDP_PORT).
4. Chrome launched on 9223 by Toby, FB logged in.
5. You discovered search-and-enrich.ts is broken (FB React hydration — fetch+regex gets pre-render HTML, zero matches).
6. Workaround approved: skip search-and-enrich, go direct Stage 1 group scrapes via batch-pipeline.ts.
7. Porter loaded tangoutopia (135 events) + Detroit cleanup (81 events) to TEST.
8. AIDI applied campaign path fixes (lib/booker.ts + sync-booker.ts point to ai-discovered/booker/ now).

## Your Open Work Items

### NOW (in progress)
- Stage 1 group scrapes running via batch-pipeline.ts on 197 enabled groups
- Report each stage completion to AIDI via hub

### NEXT (after scrapes flowing)
- Rework search-and-enrich.ts (Task #5 at AIDI level):
  - Replace fetch()+regex with page navigation + DOM query
  - Wait for React render, then query DOM for event cards
  - Simplify query builder: venue + city + event-type keyword only (drop title words)
  - batch-pipeline.ts already does DOM navigation correctly — use same pattern
  - This unblocks Harvey's 1,341 handoff events (tangomango + nytango)
  - ~1-2h estimated

### QUEUED (lower priority)
- outreach_organizers view (Option E + INSTEAD OF trigger) — approved by AIDI, not yet implemented
- Migrate pipeline entry points from classifyEvent() → classifyCanonical() (4 scripts: batch-pipeline, scan-group-posts, load-scrape-to-sqlite, run.ts)

## Design Docs Written Today

Two new docs at ai-discovered/docs/ — read when you have time:
1. SCRAPE-OPS-DESIGN.md — current operational process, communication architecture, runbook
2. FB-AWARE-SCRAPER-DESIGN.md — target autonomous architecture: slow trickle, FB-aware scraping, TT posting as reciprocal engagement cover, DOM self-healing, Mac Mini setup, Telegram notifications

The search-and-enrich breakage is exactly the DOM-change scenario described in the self-healing design. Long-term, a selector config + AI healing agent would catch this. Short-term, your fix is the right approach.

## Key Context
- Porter is ready for fresh batches — dual-shape loader handles both legacy and canonical
- Harvey's queues are clear — all handoffs delivered
- Chrome on 9223 with profile at /tmp/booker-chrome — session persists across Chrome restarts but NOT machine reboots
- FTPNTD applies: fix the process (search-and-enrich rework), not just the data

— AIDI
